## Release — backlog-campaign v0.4.0

### ✨ What's new in v0.4.0

This release extends **installation paths** to Antigravity/Gemini and Codex CLI, adds **forge scoping** for milestone- and label-filtered campaigns, and standardizes **`bc-` skill naming** for cross-platform discoverability.

#### Multi-platform builds

- **`bun run build --gemini`** — Antigravity/Gemini plugin compilation with dual-tree output (workspace `.agents/` and redistributable `.gemini-plugin/plugins/backlog-campaign/`)
- **`{{#gemini}}` conditionals** — Multitask Mode entry and platform-specific manifest shaping in compiled agents
- **`bun run build --codex`** / **`build:codex`** — opt-in Codex CLI target emitting `.codex-plugin/`, `codex-skills/`, `codex-agents/`, and `codex-marketplace.json`
- **`{{#codex}}` conditionals** — Codex-specific install triggers and skill paths in `src/`
- **README install paths** — documented Gemini (Pathway D) and Codex CLI setup alongside existing Cursor and Claude Code flows

#### Campaign scoping

- **`scope_milestone` / `scope_labels`** — optional config fields to limit forge ingest and issue creation to a milestone or label set
- **`scripts/forge-scope.ts`** — SSOT for translating scope → `gh` CLI flags across forge-sync, queue-dag, and issue-creation call sites

#### Naming & discoverability

- **`bc-*` skill namespace** — renamed from `backlog-*` across agents, playbooks, and spawn references
- **AGENTS.md** and **CLAUDE.md** — platform invoke quick reference (`@bc-coordinator`, `/bc-campaign`, `/goal run bc-campaign until empty`)

#### Conformance

- **`V-GEMINI-01`** — verify gate for Gemini plugin tree shape
- **`V-CODEX-01` through `V-CODEX-04`** — Codex marketplace, skills, and agent manifest checks (15/15 verify suite)

---

**Full feature overview:** see [v0.1.0 release notes](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole/releases/tag/v0.1.0) · [README](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole#readme)
